events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: field service, conductor selection & sizing, observed wrong insulation type for wet location, roughed in. Need decide fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Wrong insulation type for wet location is a code violation (NEC 310.10(C) maybe, wet location requires insulation suitable for wet location, e.g. THHN/THWN-2, XHHW-2, RHW-2, USE-2; Table 310.16 ampacity adjusted). Risk high? Could be high due to potential insulation breakdown, shock/fire. Component conditions installed-defective and non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 70. value not asked 0. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: conductor insulation not rated for wet location. actions: replace conductors with insulation type listed for wet locations per NEC 310.10(C) and sized per Table 310.16. references NEC 310.10(C), Table 310.16, maybe 110.3(B). Need ensure JSON valid.
